description:
The SizeSineMultiplier component makes particles multiply their size on start with a value sampled from a Sine Wave based on the time they were emitted in a particle system. 

This component is part of the Photon Dust system made by Frooxius.

fields.Speed: The speed that the Sine Wave changes.
fields.Offset: The initial offset of the Sine Wave function.
fields.MinMultiplier: The minimum value outputted by the sinewave function.
fields.MaxMultiplier: The maximum value outputted by the sinewave function.

usage: Attach to a slot, add to the list of modules in a ParticleSystem, and adjust the values to make the desired effect from this component.
